name: Shape Survivor 图形幸存者
short_description: Damn it, quickly kill the enemies surrounding you. Choose your weapon, freely combine weapon enhancements, and obtain advanced effects when fully reinforced.
detailed_description:
What kind of game is this?

  • This is a survivor like barrage shooting game. You need to choose weapons and enhancements to defeat waves of enemies, and persist for 20 minutes to achieve victory.

Game features

  • The weapon is automatic shooting, and WASD controls the movement of characters.
  • Kill enemies and drop experience, pick up experience to gain upgrades, and then choose weapons or enhancements.
  • Choose up to 5 weapons, each weapon can be freely reinforced 8 times, and after full reinforcement, obtain an advanced effect.
  • There are 10 different types of weapons with 70+different enhancements, and it is necessary to choose a reasonable construction method.
  • Enemies with multiple characteristics will refresh random events in the later stage of the map, requiring reasonable response.
